# health4.ai

> Apple Health data for AI. Open-source iOS app and cloud MCP server that gives Claude, n8n, and any AI agent native access to your HealthKit data.

## What Is health4.ai?

health4.ai bridges the gap between Apple HealthKit and AI tools. It consists of an iOS app that syncs your health data to a cloud database in the background, and an MCP server that exposes your health data as native tool calls to any AI agent. No same-WiFi requirement. Works from anywhere.

## Why It Exists

Apple has no server-side HealthKit API. Existing tools (Health Auto Export) only work over local WiFi and have unreliable background sync. health4.ai uses HKObserverQuery + BGProcessingTask for reliable background delivery and stores data in Supabase for remote access.

## Key Features

- Continuous background sync (not manual export)
- Cloud storage via Supabase (query from anywhere)
- MCP server with tools: sleep, activity, HRV, workouts, custom metrics
- Open-source (MIT) — self-host or use hosted tier
- Works with Claude Code, not just claude.ai web
- Privacy-first: your data goes to your endpoint

## Pages

- Home: https://health4.ai/
- GitHub: https://github.com/jefflitt1/health4ai
